channel.title: Julia on Xiao-Le Deng (邓小乐)
channel.description: Recent content in Julia on Xiao-Le Deng (邓小乐)

item.title: Julia在macOS数值计算AppleAccelerate加速
item.description: Run import Pkg; Pkg.add("AppleAccelerate") to install the AppleAccelerate package. 参考 https://github.com/JuliaLinearAlgebra/AppleAccelerate.jl

item.title: Install Julia on Ubuntu
item.description: Platform Specific Instructions for Official Binaries: It is strongly recommended that the official generic binaries from the downloads page be used to install Julia on Linux and FreeBSD. Download the linux installation file *.tar.gz: wget https://julialang-s3.julialang.org/bin/linux/x64/1.7/julia-1.7.1-linux-x86_64.tar.gz tar zxvf julia-1.7.1-linux-x86_64.tar.gz Add Julia’s bin folder (with full path) to PATH environment (gedit ~/.bashrc & source ~/.bashrc): export PATH=/home/deng/julia-1.7.1/bin:$PATH

item.title: Run Julia in Sublime on macOS
item.description: 1. Step Open Tools -> Build System -> New Build System in Sublime and paste these commands: { "shell_cmd": "/Applications/Julia-1.7.app/Contents/Resources/julia/bin/julia $file", "file_regex": "^(..[^:]*):([0-9]+):?([0-9]+)?:? (.*)$", "working_dir": "${file_path}", "selector": "source.jl", "shell": true } Note that /Applications/Julia-1.7.app/Contents/Resources/julia/bin/julia is the installation path of Julia on macOS. Save the file Julia.sublime-build at the path Sublime Text3/Packages/User. In Tools -> Build System, Julia will be shown. 2. Test with Hello Julia Save the command as Hello.jl:

item.title: Install Julia on macOS
item.description: 1. Download At the official website https://julialang.org/downloads/, download the file julia-1.7.1-mac64.dmg. Drag and install Julia in the traditional way of macOS. 2. Add Julia to PATH sudo mkdir -p /usr/local/bin sudo rm -f /usr/local/bin/julia sudo ln -s /Applications/Julia-1.7.app/Contents/Resources/julia/bin/julia /usr/local/bin/julia or open ~/.zshrc and add this command: alias julia=\''/Applications/Julia-1.7.app/Contents/Resources/julia/bin/julia'\' 3. Reference Platform Specific Instructions for Official Binaries
